name: Privacy policy page loads with complete content and proper heading structure
description: The privacy policy page renders fully with all required sections, proper heading hierarchy, and a back-to-home navigation link.

planSteps.description: Verify the privacy policy page loads with a main heading containing 'Privacy Policy', and the page body contains multiple sections with sub-headings covering topics like data collection, usage, and contact information
Verify the page header contains a 'Back to Home' navigation link that allows users to return to the main site
